description_for_human: India's #1 AV system integrator — audio visual solutions, architectural acoustics, smart classrooms, boardroom AV, auditorium sound systems, lighting design, IT infrastructure.
description_for_model: SecureTech AV Designs Private Limited is India's leading AV (Audio Visual) system integrator. Services include: (1) Architectural Acoustics - sound isolation, acoustic treatment, room optimization for auditoriums, studios, commercial spaces; (2) Audio Visual Systems - professional audio, video walls, projection, conferencing, digital signage, PA systems; (3) Lighting Architecture - architectural lighting, stage lighting, LED, smart lighting control; (4) Information Technology - IT infrastructure, network design, structured cabling, server rooms; (5) Project Management - end-to-end AV project lifecycle; (6) Post-Project Services - AMC, 24/7 support, upgrades. Sectors: Corporate boardrooms, Education smart classrooms, Healthcare, Government, Retail, Residential home theatres, Auditoriums, Stadiums, Cinemas, Clubs, Judiciary courts. Brand partners: Bose, JBL, Sennheiser, Sony, LG, Cisco, Christie, Kramer, QNC, British Acoustics. Location: A-70, Sector 33, Noida, UP 201301, India. 150+ clients, 200+ projects, 5-star Google rating (29 reviews).
